A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: How is the faculty at Theni Kammavar Sangam College of Technology?
faqs.answer: Theni Kammavar Sangam College of Technology has been rated 5 for faculty as per reviews by students. This shows that Institute has qualified and experienced faculty members.

faqs.question: What facilities are there at Theni Kammavar Sangam College of Technology in terms of infrastructure?
faqs.answer: Theni Kammavar Sangam College of Technology has been rated 5 on Infrastructure parameter. Theni Kammavar Sangam College of Technology has also been rated 5 for Campuslife.

faqs.question: How can I get into Theni Kammavar Sangam College of Technology for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Theni Kammavar Sangam College of Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
B.E. / B.Tech Candidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.
M.E./M.Tech Candidate must have completed B.E./B.Tech. in Mechanical Engg./Mechatronics/Automobile Engg./Marine Engg./Manufacturing Tech./Aeronautical Engg./Production Engg./Tech./Mechanical and Automation Engg/Industrial Engg/Robotics & Automation. Candidate belonging to reserved category must have 45% in qualifying examination. Candidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field. Candidates with B.E./B.Tech. degrees obtained through Distance/Weekend mode are not eligible. Candidates with degree obtained without studying 10th/12th Std. or 3 years degree programme are not eligible. Candidates appearing for the final semester/year are also eligible.

faqs.question: What are the courses that Theni Kammavar Sangam College of Technology offers?
faqs.answer: Theni Kammavar Sangam College of Technology has courses such as B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech to offer. These courses are in the stream of Engineering. Theni Kammavar Sangam College of Technology offers specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in VLSI Design.

A:    Theni Kammavar Sangam College of Technology offers Degree courses including 5 UG and 2 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Theni Kammavar Sangam College of Technology has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in VLSI Design.
faqs.question: Which major specializations are available at Theni Kammavar Sangam College of Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    The overall seats available across all courses offered by Theni Kammavar Sangam College of Technology is up to 366. Good thing to know is that Theni Kammavar Sangam College of Technology has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.

college_info.college_name: Jigyasa University: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Cutoff

highlights.summary: Jigyasa University (formerly known as Himgiri Zee University) admissions 2024 are open for various courses.

college_info.intro:
Jigyasa University popular programmes are BTech and BCom. BTech students are placed in top companies such as Chessian Consultants, ICICI Prudential Life Insurance, ShriRam Healthcare, Windlas Biotech Ltd, and others. BTech students can work as Software Engineers, Developers, or can go for non-technical fields auch as Marketing, Sales, and others.
Himgiri Zee University Dehradun has experienced faculty members. The university has an industry-tailored curriculum and the university has a flexible & transparent academic system. Zee Himgiri University provides state-of-the-art facilities to students. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Jigyasa University and their respective eligibility and Jigyasa University fee structure:
For more information about Jigyasa University check out the below video:

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Himgiri Zee University provides internships to its students. Further, it is mandatory for every student to undertake internship and industrial training to complete their degree courses. The training and placement cell at HZU helps students in choosing and obtaining internships accordingly. Other than this, during the internship program, the assigned faculty mentor along-with the industry mentor evaluates the student’s progress as well.
faqs.question: Does Himgiri Zee University provide internships?

The gradutes with a BA degree in Restaurant Management can build in career in the field of catering or hospitality. Candidates who have pursued a BA in Digital Tourism or  BA in Journalism and Mass Communication at Jigyasa University can get job related to the tourism sector, media industry, content writing, travel vlogging, etc. BA graduates of Jigyasa University are also elgible t
faqs.question: What are the career prospects after pursuing BA from Jigyasa University?

faqs.answer: A:    The semester-wise fee for BPharma at Jigyasa University is INR 55,000. The total BPharma fee at Jigyasa University for four years (eight semesters) is INR 4.4 lakh.  Candidates must note that this fee is sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative. The other components included in the Jigyasa University fees are one-time fees, security deposit, hostel fee, mess charges, etc.
faqs.question: What is the semester-wise fee for BPharma at Jigyasa University?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates applying for admission to the desired course at Jigyasa University must pay an application fee of INR 1,000.
faqs.question: How much is the application fee at Jigyasa University?

faqs.answer: A:    BPharma fee at Jigyasa University includes multiple components including the tuition fees, hostel feel, registration fee, caution money, insurance charges, etc. Some of these components like the caution money, registration fee and hostel security deposit are payable once at the time of admission. The other fee components like the tuition fee are payable at the beginning of each semester. The tuition fee for BPharma at the university is INR 4.4 Lacs for four years. The semester-wise fee comes down to INR 55,000. The mentioned fee has been sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. They are subject to change and hence, are indicative.
faqs.question: What are the various components included in the fee structure of BPharma at Jigyasa University?

faqs.answer: A:    Jigyasa University provides merit-based scholarships to the students based on their merit in the qualifying exam. For BPharma students, the merit in Class 12 is considered as the criteria for the merit-based scholarships. These scholarships are offered only for the first year. To extend the scholarship further, the student must maintain a CGPA over 7 and a minimum attendance of 75% in every semester. The scholarships are provided in the form of fee waiver. reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. in Journalism and Mass Communication - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: If you want to become successful, then take admission in our college.

review_content.Placements: Our college has a good placement team which always places more students in good companies. The average package of our college is 4 lacs/annum. Top recruiting companies for our course that come to our college include Zee Media, Dainik Jagran, Amar Ujala, etc. 100% of students got internships at Zee Media.
review_content.Infrastructure: All equipment used in our field is available. The campus is 55 acres with Wi-Fi. The labs are fully furnished, and the classrooms and washrooms are clean. All faculty members are helpful. The open cafeteria and good food are available in the canteen and mess. Medical facilities are also good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Education (B.Ed.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely the best college because of good placements and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Maximum placements were placed in my college with an average of 95%, and the good thing is the average package is 5-6L per annum. The highest package is 3 cr per annum, and the lowest is 3L per annum. 100% of students got internships in all types of colleges and schools to which they are capable.
review_content.Infrastructure: All rooms have Wi-Fi connections. There is a separate auditorium hall for all other courses . The library is available anytime for any student. The hostel is so affordable with lots of facilities like Wi-Fi 4 times, food, and 24*7 medical facilities, a cafeteria with healthy food.

overview_faqs.question: What is the semester-wise fees for BCom at Jigyasa University?
overview_faqs.answer: The semester-wise fee for BCom at Jigyasa University is INR 30,000. The total BCom fee at Jigyasa University for three years (six semesters) is INR 1.8 lakh. Candidates must note that this fee is sourced from the official website of the institute/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative. The other components included in the Jigyasa University fees are one-time fees, security deposit, hostel fee, mess fee, etc.

overview_faqs.question: What is the course fees for 3 years B.A course at Jigyasa University?
overview_faqs.answer: At Jigyasa University (formerly known as Himgiri Zee University), BA fee varies across the BA specialisations. The range of BA tuition fee at the university is INR 1.4 Lakh - and INR 2.1 Lakh. Candidates must note that this fee is sourced from the official website of the institute/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative. The other components included in the Jigyasa University fees are registration fees, security deposit, hostel fee, mess fee, etc.

overview_faqs.question: Is Jigyasa Univeristy a good option for pursuing BCom?
overview_faqs.answer: Jigyasa University, Dehradun offers BCom (Hons) with a total intake of 30 students. The university claims to have a well-designed curriculum for BCom. The curriculum comprises theory and practical application of concepts that prepare students to meet the challenges of the growing business world. The university also has a dedicated placement cell to assist students in finding suitable job opportunities. The maximum package record during the campus placements is INR 10 LPA across all the courses. Top companies including Bajaj, Wipro, ZEE Media, and others are known to have participated in the Jigyasa University placement drive. The university offers free Wi-Fi, hygienic classrooms and labs. There is a central library at the university. The hostel and mess facilities are also available the campus. The overall rating of Jigyasa University based on the student reviews on Shiksha.com is 4.1/5.

overview_faqs.question: What is the semester-wise fee for BPharma at Jigyasa University?
overview_faqs.answer: The semester-wise fee for BPharma at Jigyasa University is INR 55,000. The total BPharma fee at Jigyasa University for four years (eight semesters) is INR 4.4 lakh. Candidates must note that this fee is sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative. The other components included in the Jigyasa University fees are one-time fees, security deposit, hostel fee, mess charges, etc.

review_summary.college_name: Jigyasa University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Computer Application - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Great faculty, placements, and infrastructures.

content.Placements: In Jigyasa University, 90% of BCA students get placed with packages ranging from 3 to 6 LPA. Around 90% of students secure internships in top firms like Hero Wired and Pisoft Informatics Limited. The best roles are offered, ensuring strong career prospects.
content.Infrastructure: Our hostel offers great facilities, quality food, medical support, and sports options. The technical department includes 24x7 Wi-Fi, computer labs, more than 3 clean classrooms, and a vast library. It ensures a strong academic environment. The hostel has good freedom.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Computer Application - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: We have a very big campus and good placements.

content.Placements: In my batch, there were 18 students. I have to be honest about the placement system; it's not exceptional, but the placement cell is doing its best to provide good opportunities for students. I would say about 50% of my batch has secured placements or internships, while the rest are pursuing their paths.
content.Infrastructure: Regarding infrastructure, our university is impressive. It features a large campus with a swimming pool and a spacious football field. There are two parking areas and a beautiful agricultural section. The campus spans approximately 40 acres of land, and it's particularly stunning in the evening.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Journalism and Mass Communication - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: If you want to become successful, then take admission in our college.

content.Placements: Our college has a good placement team which always places more students in good companies. The average package of our college is 4 lacs/annum. Top recruiting companies for our course that come to our college include Zee Media, Dainik Jagran, Amar Ujala, etc. 100% of students got internships at Zee Media.
content.Infrastructure: All equipment used in our field is available. The campus is 55 acres with Wi-Fi. The labs are fully furnished, and the classrooms and washrooms are clean. All faculty members are helpful. The open cafeteria and good food are available in the canteen and mess. Medical facilities are also good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Education (B.Ed.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely the best college because of good placements and facilities.

content.Placements: Maximum placements were placed in my college with an average of 95%, and the good thing is the average package is 5-6L per annum. The highest package is 3 cr per annum, and the lowest is 3L per annum. 100% of students got internships in all types of colleges and schools to which they are capable.
content.Infrastructure: All rooms have Wi-Fi connections. There is a separate auditorium hall for all other courses . The library is available anytime for any student. The hostel is so affordable with lots of facilities like Wi-Fi 4 times, food, and 24*7 medical facilities, a cafeteria with healthy food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of Jigyasa university.

content.Placements: I am a student at Jigyasa University of the 2022 batch in B.Tech computer science engineering; there is almost 50 to 80 percent placement rate, but the average package is around 3 to 5 lacs depending on the student in computer science; mostly web development or data science job roles are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is quite good in our university, as almost every single class has its own projectors and smart screens consisting of good quality tables and chairs. As for hostels, I am a day scholar, but I have visited hostels as well, and they are well maintained.

admission_overview.college_name: Jigyasa University Admission 2025: Application, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Criteria

admission_process.title: Jigyasa University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: JU admission 2025is currently open for various courses. The university offers courses, such as BSc, BTech, MBA, etc., at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers doctorate and diploma courses. To get admitted to JU, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. The university offers more than 12 courses in various streams such as Pharmacy, Engineering, Management, etc. The application process atJigyasa Universityis conducted online. Read the following article to know more aboutJigyasa Universitycourse admission2025.
Jigyasa University admission 2025is merit-based. Jigyasa University offers 12 courses at the UG and PG levels in multiple streams like Arts, Business & Management, Engineering, Pharmacy, etc.

Admission toJU coursesis based on merit. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements for the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popularJU courses:
Class 12 with a minimum 45% aggregate in Physics, Chemistry and Maths (PCM)
Jigyasa University's admission process includes registration and application form evaluation. Candidates must follow the steps below to get a seat in JU:
1: Jigyasa University Application Process
Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the institute. Students can also check the detailedJigyasa University feestructure here.
2: Selection Rounds
Selection is merit based. Additionally, the eligibility criteria set by the university must be met.
3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. To allot and confirm the seat, candidates are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.

placement_report.college_name: Jigyasa University Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: Jigyasa University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The highest package offered during Jigyasa University placements in recent past was INR 10 LPA. The highest package was offered to an MBA student by a leading EdTech company during Jigyasa University placements. In addition, companies such as ICICI Prudential Life Insurance , JW Marriott and Saaransh Agro Solutions visited the campus during Jigyasa University placements 2023. Further, according to students’ reviews gathered from online sources, the average package offered during Jigyasa University iplacements in recent past stood at INR 3 LPA . Further, the placement rate recorded during Jigyasa University placements 2023 was almost 90%.

faqs.question: Does Himgiri Zee University provide internships?
faqs.answer: Yes, Himgiri Zee University provides internships to its students. Further, it is mandatory for every student to undertake internship and industrial training to complete their degree courses. The training and placement cell at HZU helps students in choosing and obtaining internships accordingly. Other than this, during the internship program, the assigned faculty mentor along-with the industry mentor evaluates the student’s progress as well.

faqs.question: What are the government jobs that I can seek after pursuing BSc (Hons) in Agriculture at Jigyasa University?
faqs.answer: After pursuing BSc (Hons) in Agriculture at Jigyasa University , candidates can seek various job opportunities in the private as well as the government sector. The government job opportunities that are available to BSc (Hons) in Agriculture at the university are listed below: 1. Banking 2. PPO/DHO/AEO/ADO/CAO (PSC exams) 3. Civil services exams IAS/PCS/IFS ( Agriculture as a subject) 4. Seed Certification Inspectors 5. Food Corporation of India 6. Agriculture Development Projects 7. Enterpreneurship Development Programmes 8. Agri Advisory and consultancy 9. Lab assistants, Field assistants and Technical Assistants in deptts. of Agriculture Universities

faqs.question: How are MBA placements at Himgiri Zee University?
faqs.answer: Regarding Himgiri Zee University placements for 2023, the highest level of packages that were offered ranged from INR 10 LPA to INR 12 LPA. This is a significant recognition of the quality of talent leaving the university. These upscale packages demonstrate students' proficiency as well as the demand for and acknowledgment of the skills developed in the university classroom.In general, the average placement package was INR 3 LPA, even though the peak packages established a strong standard. The difference between the best and average packages highlights the range of opportunities that students came across while trying to find a place to study. It's representative of a range in which some received attractive offers, demonstrating the university's capacity to turn out graduates who can thrive in cutthroat professional environments, and others discovered opportunities that matched the more reasonable, albeit respectable, average package.

hostel.description: The University has made the provision of separate AC / Non AC hostels for boys and girls. The students are provided with basic amenities like a cot, study table, chair, bedside table and a cupboard in their respective rooms. Laundry facility is available on payment basis.

library.description: The Library has state - of the - art information systems and provides access to an extensive range of database, together with the traditional printed material. The library is stocked with more than 30,000 books, 4000 titles and a number of journals and reports that cover all subjects. Although the primary mission of the library is to support the curricular and research needs of the students, the library also provides material and reference assistance for the faculty.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Tennis Court, Volleyball Court

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Mechanical Lab, Physics Lab

reviews.review_heading: Great faculty, placements, and infrastructures.
reviews.review_text: Our hostel offers great facilities, quality food, medical support, and sports options. The technical department includes 24x7 Wi-Fi, computer labs, more than 3 clean classrooms, and a vast library. It ensures a strong academic environment. The hostel has good freedom.

reviews.review_heading: We have a very big campus and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Regarding infrastructure, our university is impressive. It features a large campus with a swimming pool and a spacious football field. There are two parking areas and a beautiful agricultural section. The campus spans approximately 40 acres of land, and it's particularly stunning in the evening.

reviews.review_heading: If you want to become successful, then take admission in our college.
reviews.review_text: All equipment used in our field is available. The campus is 55 acres with Wi-Fi. The labs are fully furnished, and the classrooms and washrooms are clean. All faculty members are helpful. The open cafeteria and good food are available in the canteen and mess. Medical facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely the best college because of good placements and facilities.
reviews.review_text: All rooms have Wi-Fi connections. There is a separate auditorium hall for all other courses . The library is available anytime for any student. The hostel is so affordable with lots of facilities like Wi-Fi 4 times, food, and 24*7 medical facilities, a cafeteria with healthy food.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jigyasa university.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite good in our university, as almost every single class has its own projectors and smart screens consisting of good quality tables and chairs. As for hostels, I am a day scholar, but I have visited hostels as well, and they are well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of college life is not up to mark.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like labs and libraries are good, and mess food is also up to par. Overall, the average sports facility is good for basketball and football, and their cricket ground is nothing but an empty field with long-grown grasses, so do not expect much.

reviews.review_heading: If you are looking to get your B.Tech done in between 4 LPA - 5 LPA, go for it.
reviews.review_text: There are 3 labs, out of which, 2 have the latest 12th gen in them. When it comes to the infrastructure of this course, it has changed since 2023. The curriculum has changed and now focuses more on developing ideas instead of just remembering which is good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides all students with good placements in reputed companies.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our campus is very good. The library and classrooms are well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college, and I would recommend students to join this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is well maintained. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Hostel facilities are good. The canteen facility is decent. Medical facilities are available 24X7. Sports and games are available.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good campus in Dehradun.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi is available in the university. Hygienic labs and classrooms are available. The university has a central library. Hostel facilities are above-average. The food is good, and the prices are very less compared to outside restaurants. Sports are conducted by the university, and they are excellent.

reviews.review_heading: Hotel facilities are good with hygienic and tasty food being served.
reviews.review_text: There infrastructure of our college is good. Indoor and outdoor games facilities are available for sports like basketball, volleyball, etc. All the courts are excellent and well-maintained but the cricket ground looks like it is a field of agriculture department. Hotel facilities are good with hygienic and tasty food being served. Classrooms are well maintained with Wi-Fi available for all the students. Library is one of the best place in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Placement cell is average for agriculture students in our college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel life was quite good in the college. Free Wi-Fi service was provided with good connectivity. Hostel food was also good including fruits, milk, tea, snacks, sweet dishes, etc. The medical facility was also decent. A doctor and a nurse were available on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure and medical facilities are very good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and a library are available. Food quality is not that good, but medical facilities are very good. Infrastructure is very good in our college, and canteen food is also very good. There are an open gym and a big ground for football and other sports.

reviews.review_heading: Well, its ones choice, no such recommendation.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was good. Had cleaned classrooms and library. Study rooms also provided. No such knowledge of Hostels. Quality of canteen food was good. Apart from basic first aid they helped to get medical treatment from hospitals. Having good space for sports activities like cricket, volleyball etc. No space issue.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Himgiri Zee University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. There is a projector in our classroom. The hostel facility is good and separate rooms are available for the students. Mess serves the best food. The canteen and cafeteria serve food at an affordable price. Medical facilities are also available with a professional nurse.

college_info.college_name: Jigyasa University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: The semester-wise fee for BCom at Jigyasa University is INR 30,000. The total BCom fee at Jigyasa University for three years (six semesters) is INR 1.8 lakh.  Candidates must note that this fee is sourced from the official website of the institute/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative. The other components included in the Jigyasa University fees are one-time fees, security deposit, hostel fee, mess fee, etc.
Yes, Jigyasa University provides scholarships to its students in the form of fee waiver. The students can apply for any one of the following scholarships at Jigyasa University:
An additional scholarship/fee concession of 10% is offered to those students who belong to Signiwala Village, Selequi and other villages near the university campus.
Candidates applying for admission to the desired course at Jigyasa University must pay an application fee of INR 1,000.

Students at HZU can take advantage of a number of opportunities to apply for scholarships based on their merit, place of residence, and family relationships. Candidates for the Merit Scholarship will receive a 100% tuition fee waiver if they receive at least 90% on the qualifying exam. With a 5% cap on total seats, this esteemed scholarship promotes academic excellence.The Domicile of Uttarakhand Scholarship offers a 30% tuition fee waiver to accepted students who achieve a remarkable 60% on the qualifying exam. This programme seeks to assist regional talent and advance residents of Uttarakhand's educational attainment.Moreover, brothers and sisters of current HZU students or alumni are eligible for a 25% tuition fee waiver through the Sibling Scholarship. This helps families connected to the university with their educational journey and builds a sense of community.Eligible students must make sure they meet the requirements during the admissions process in order to be eligible for these scholarships. Within its academic community, HZU seeks to uphold familial ties, encourage participation in the local community, and honour academic achievement.

reviews_list.review_title: Faculty members are good but infrastructure of college is not so good.

review_content.Placements: I am a student of WIT, which is a campus institute of VMSB UTU Dehradun. The placement record is not so much to be delighted at this college. College claims 95% placement record but it is absolutely wrong. We have seen many left unplaced, preparing for placement or other exams.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities in college are decent but don't compare with what we get in private college compared to a private college. The area in which college is situated is very less. Labs are shared with other colleges, and we don't have our own labs. Computer labs in our college do not have any computers or are not in working state.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Not so good infrastructure at this college.

review_content.Placements: I have just completed my first year in June 2025. After this college, I ask to do an internship in a specific field according to my interest. The college doesn't help you to find an internship. It has to be done ourselves. There are many online websites that you can refer to for the same.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of college is not so good. Classroom never gets clean after complaining.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members also varies, there are two types of teachers means faculty members one are contact based other are permanent. The contact faculty members stay in friendly behaviour with the students while the permanent faculty members also behave in a rude and strict manner with the students. Talking about the course of this college, there are very less courses offered by college that are BCA with only 70 seats B.Tech with around 150 seats including all branches and M.Tech with 6-7 seats.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: A decent college in Dehradun.

review_content.Placements: I am a first-year B.Tech student at Women Institute of Technology. Here, I have seen no placement cell for the interview purpose. Although students have to prepare by themselves for the interview and placement. The highest package from this college may be around 6 LPA to 7 LPA this year.
review_content.Infrastructure: The course of the semester is divided into two parts, even and odd. The whole criteria for passing into next semester is credit-based. You need to score minimum of 23 credits, overall in one year to get promoted to another semester. Also, it is not as challenging as the difficult level, which is moderate.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Women Institute of Technology – A College in Dehradun.

content.Placements: The placement system of the college is decent. You can sit in the placements after the completion of your third year onwards. Most of the placements are done on the campus itself. The college also takes students to other private colleges which are located in the city of Dehradun, such as Graphic Era College, for placements. Other than this, the highest package from our college always goes between 8 to 10 LPA. Moreover, you should try to build up your resume and other skills to get a better package.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel facilities are still not available in the college, but there are many other private hostels present outside the college area in which you can enroll or register whenever you come for admission. The college provides all the information regarding these hostels which are nearby the college. Also, these hostels are not very expensive.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is a campus with good facilities and a supportive environment.

content.Placements: I am a B. Tech, Computer Science student, batch 2023–2027. Our course focuses on core CS fundamentals, programming, software development, cybersecurity, AI/ML, and emerging technologies. The college brings companies that provide an average package of 15–30 LPA. Some of the major companies that recruit from our course include Infosys, TCS, Accenture, and HCL. The top roles offered in our course include software developer, Java developer, and full-stack developer. Along with a frontend developer, backend developer, DevOps engineer, cloud support associate, and data analyst.

reviews.review_heading: Women Institute of Technology – A College in Dehradun.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities are still not available in the college, but there are many other private hostels present outside the college area in which you can enroll or register whenever you come for admission. The college provides all the information regarding these hostels which are nearby the college. Also, these hostels are not very expensive.

reviews.review_heading: It is a campus with good facilities and a supportive environment.
reviews.review_text: The Computer Science and Engineering department has a modern and well equipped learning environment. It is designed to support academic and practical learning. The key facilities include spacious and ventilated classrooms with digital projectors and smart boards. It has a comfortable seating arrangements suitable for long sessions. Regular power backup for uninterrupted teaching. Computer labs for AI and machine learning. Along with database management, network security, and programming.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are good but infrastructure of college is not so good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in college are decent but don't compare with what we get in private college compared to a private college. The area in which college is situated is very less. Labs are shared with other colleges, and we don't have our own labs. Computer labs in our college do not have any computers or are not in working state.

reviews.review_heading: Not so good infrastructure at this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of college is not so good. Classroom never gets clean after complaining.

reviews.review_heading: A decent college in Dehradun.
reviews.review_text: The course of the semester is divided into two parts, even and odd. The whole criteria for passing into next semester is credit-based. You need to score minimum of 23 credits, overall in one year to get promoted to another semester. Also, it is not as challenging as the difficult level, which is moderate.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Women Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: About the college course, each year is divided into two semesters one is the odd semester another is even. Every semester the college gives 4-5 main subjects with credit and 1-2 side subjects which are noncredit ( does not add in your CGPA). There are separate departments with separate buildings for each semester.

reviews.review_heading: It is a highly recommended college.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are decent, well-furnished, and maintained properly with regular cleaning. The also consists of smart whiteboards for programming and digital teaching purposes. The college also conducts many sports events for students among different colleges to have a spirit of winning and leadership.

reviews.review_heading: Good sports facilities in the college.
reviews.review_text: The college consists of many sports facilities, clubs, and societies. Majorly, the college has the IEEE Society, which mainly deals with cultural fests held in the college or any other event. It is a paid society that costs around Rs.1350 for one year.

reviews.review_heading: WIT: A college in Dehradun.
reviews.review_text: The college consists of a football crown as well as a cricket ground. In addition to this the college also has basketball and volleyball courts beside these outdoor games are available. There are also indoor sections in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Good college in Dehradun WIT.
reviews.review_text: The course of the college is made with all the futuristic needs in field of engineering and others. Every year, the college course is a bit change to modify according to the upcoming inventions. The mess facilities of the hostels are decent. They also provide you with induction and gas stove if you want to make your meal by yourself.

reviews.review_heading: Review of WIT in UTU.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities are below average in the college not in terms of cleanliness or space but in terms of food and the behavior of the warden. The hostel timing is from 6 in the morning to 9 in the night. If we want to go after that we need to get permission for a gate pass from parents or guardians.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: In terms of facilities, there are no proper facilities in the college. The examination cell, placement cell, and other internship cells also do not do any work or facilitate students in terms of any needs. The canteen facilities of this college are very poor.

reviews.review_heading: College in Dehradun, WIT Sudhowala.
reviews.review_text: Appropriate classrooms for students are not available in the college. The college is on a small acre of land with limited facilities. The quality of food in the mess is also very bad. In addition to this, the hostel is very costly.

reviews.review_heading: WIT Dehradun is not a great college.
reviews.review_text: There are no proper facilities in the college. There are limited classrooms in which more than a hundred students are sitting in one classroom. There is only one library having only limited books, which is the reason only half of the percent of students can issue books during a semester.

reviews.review_heading: A great college in Dehradun.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities are available outside the college premises as currently, the college does not have its hostel constructed. The college area is very less this is a major reason for not having a hostel. Also, these hostels have many disadvantages, no out pass facilities in college period to enjoy. Hostel don't allow you to go anywhere after 6:30 PM.

individual_reviews.title: The college ambiance is nice but some of the rules that can't be acceptable to everyone.

content.Placements: Above fifty per cent of students were placed from our college and they recruited to the companies like Mahindra, Tata, etc. There are so many students who completed their internship programme.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are good. The hospitality they provide is better. Hostel food is also good enough. Wi-Fi isn't available in the hostel. The atmosphere is very calm and studious. The hostel warden is also very well-mannered and friendly to the students.
content.Faculty: The teachers are helpful. They provide good care in our studies and other curriculum activities. They are very eager to make their students participate in symposiums and other tech and nontechnical events conducted in our college and other colleges.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Agriculture Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: Placements are good in our college. In the IT sector, we have good placements and we also get placement opportunities from various core companies.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is very good. Our campus is huge and well-designed. This college is currently having all the basic infrastructure that students should have. It has a proper laboratory. We have a decent library and several books are available. There are two boys' hostels and two girls' hostels which accommodate all girls and boys of 3rd and 4th year. Conditions of the newly built hostels are very good. Classrooms are also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Agriculture Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Placement in last year was really good and most of the students got placed..

content.Placements: Placements are going good. About 10-20 % of students were placed per year in agriculture engineering. About 20,000-30,000 per month salary was offered. Mostly Mahendra, TATA and some IT companies were comingfor recruitment. About 75% of students have got internship from our course in various companies.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities of our college is very nice. The infrastructure of our college is average for agriculture engineering. Wi-Fi is not provided in over campus, labs are available but few number of classes are available. Hostel was average food was below average medical facilities are available.

hostel_campus.college_name: Dhanalakshmi Srinivasan Institute of Research and Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: DSIRT has two hostel blocks one each for boys and girls. Facilities such as dining room, common room, recreation room, wash room,etc are provided separately for boys and girls. It has cooperative mess that is managed by the hostel residents themselves.

library.description: Th college has a centrally air-conditioned library in a carpet area of 6000 sq.ft with a seating capacity of around 130 students. It has a collection of about 6,000 volumes of books,periodicals,back volumes and projects.The library subscribes to 190 periodicals inclusive of 82 international journals, 75 national journals, 09 international magazines, and 25 National magazines. We have 1750 Non-book Materials. The library of the college is fully computerized and connected with DELNET (Developing Library Network) New Delhi, through which our students are able to access the records & database of 255 institutions in India and abroad connected to the network. It also has digital library facility. It is member of Developing Library Network (DELNET), New Delhi; British council Library, Chennai and IEEE (Institution of Electrical & Electronics Engineers), USA.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Table Tennis, Volley Ball Court, Ball Badminton

reviews.review_heading: My college has great faculty, modern labs and events that support learning and growth.
reviews.review_text: Our college campus offers a wide range of modern facilities to support student learning and growth. Students can enjoy a hygienic canteen, hostel facilities, and 24/7 security. These amenities create a comfortable and productive environment for both academic and personal development.

faqs.answer: A:    The total seats that are available for MBA at RNB Global University is 60 till date. The admission to MBA course in this college is based on CUET- PG results and the median package you get is around INR 1 LPA.
faqs.question: How many seats are available for MBA at RNB Global University?

faqs.answer: A:    The minimum eligibility criteria for MBA in RNB Global University requires the candidates to complete graduation from any recognised university with at least a 50% aggregate along with GD and PI. review_content.General: The campus is modern and quite well-maintained. My department has Wi-Fi enabled, a smart classroom, a dedicated computer lab, seminar halls, and a good library with updated books and digital resources. The hostel is comfortable - rooms are spacious and cleaned regularly. The mess food is hygienic, though the taste can be repetitive sometimes. There's a canteen and the medical room has a nurse and basic first aid. For sports, there's a big ground, basketball, volleyball, badminton court, and indoor games too.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best university to pursue the B.A course in Rajasthan.

review_content.Placements: The university has a training and placement cell that helps students get internships and placements in different companies and operations. 50% of students from my batch got placements, and many others also got the chance to do internships in a reputed organisation of the country, and many of them even got pre-placement offers. Companies such as Reliance, Bikaji, ICICI Bank, HDFC Bank, Byju's, etc., visit the college for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have smart classrooms with a projector and fully air-conditioned, and a fire alarm and extinguishing system. We have a great Wi-Fi connection with the central library and digital library with a collection of books for every type and every topic. We also have daily newspapers of minimum 5 types and different types of magazines and journals. The hostel of the university is made in such a way that students feel comfortable with a homely environment with a lot of storage area, a study table, a chair, and fully furnished, and good quality food. It also has medical facilities and a wellness centre.

reviews_list.batch_info: Integrated BBA + LL.B - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Honest review of RNB Global University.

review_content.Placements: Placements are good only for MBA and BBA, not for law or other courses. Top companies include Reliance. About 40% of students get placed. Only internships are in the law course. We don't get any opportunities from law firms through our college. We have to find them on our own. Overall, it is good.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and facilities are good, except for the Wi-Fi in the boys' hostel, which is worse. There are certain restrictions on Wi-Fi, and since our college is on the outskirts of Bikaner. There is a network problem often. The Wi-Fi in the boys' hostel is worse. The quality of food is good but sometimes bad. There is only one canteen, and the food items are above MRP.

overview_faqs.question: Is RNB Global University under CUET?
overview_faqs.answer: RNB Global University, Bikaner is a prestigious college providing its student with overall development. It offers undergraduate, postgraduate, PhD and integrated programmes in major fields. The University accepts applications to a wide variety of bachelor's, master's and doctoral degree programmes such as BSc, BTech, BA, BBA, MTech, MBA, MSc, MA, PhD, etc. Admission to various courses at RNB Global University is based on cutoff ranks. review_summary.college_name: RNB Global University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Human Resource Management - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good choice for BBA in HRM with supportive teachers and a peaceful campus.

content.Placements: I am from the BBA (Human Resource Management) 2023-2026 batch at RNB Global University. The placement support for HR students is improving year by year. The placement cell guides us for internships and final placements. Many seniors have done HR internships in Jaipur, Delhi, and nearby cities. Some companies do visit campus, but for HR we also have to apply outside to get good exposure. The placement cell helps us prepare for interviews and resume-making, which I found helpful.
content.Infrastructure: The university campus is clean and peaceful, which is good for studying. Classrooms are well-maintained with proper seating and projectors for presentation. The library is helpful for every student to access online resources. Hostel rooms are decent and cleaned regularly. Mess food is fine on most days but sometimes can be improved. There is Wi-Fi in the hostel and academic blocks, but the speed drops sometimes. I like spending time in the library and the lawns.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Marketing - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Modern campus, supportive faculty, and decent placement at RNBGU Bikaner.

content.Placements: I'm from the BBA 2023-26 batch and am currently in my 4th sem. From what I've seen, placements are decent if you stay active. In my seniors batch, about 75% of students got placed. The highest package for BBA was around 6 LPA, which I think is fair for this region. Companies like ICICI Bank, Reliance, and TCS visit the campus. Right now I'm doing my internship within RNBGU itself, and this opportunity was given to all interested students by the University. Overall the placement cell is supportive if you keep in touch with them and don't miss the drives.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is modern and quite well-maintained. My department has Wi-Fi enabled, a smart classroom, a dedicated computer lab, seminar halls, and a good library with updated books and digital resources. The hostel is comfortable - rooms are spacious and cleaned regularly. The mess food is hygienic, though the taste can be repetitive sometimes. There's a canteen and the medical room has a nurse and basic first aid. For sports, there's a big ground, basketball, volleyball, badminton court, and indoor games too.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is the best university to pursue the B.A course in Rajasthan.

content.Placements: The university has a training and placement cell that helps students get internships and placements in different companies and operations. 50% of students from my batch got placements, and many others also got the chance to do internships in a reputed organisation of the country, and many of them even got pre-placement offers. Companies such as Reliance, Bikaji, ICICI Bank, HDFC Bank, Byju's, etc., visit the college for placements.
content.Infrastructure: We have smart classrooms with a projector and fully air-conditioned, and a fire alarm and extinguishing system. We have a great Wi-Fi connection with the central library and digital library with a collection of books for every type and every topic. We also have daily newspapers of minimum 5 types and different types of magazines and journals. The hostel of the university is made in such a way that students feel comfortable with a homely environment with a lot of storage area, a study table, a chair, and fully furnished, and good quality food. It also has medical facilities and a wellness centre.

individual_reviews.course: Integrated BBA + LL.B - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Honest review of RNB Global University.

content.Placements: Placements are good only for MBA and BBA, not for law or other courses. Top companies include Reliance. About 40% of students get placed. Only internships are in the law course. We don't get any opportunities from law firms through our college. We have to find them on our own. Overall, it is good.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and facilities are good, except for the Wi-Fi in the boys' hostel, which is worse. There are certain restrictions on Wi-Fi, and since our college is on the outskirts of Bikaner. There is a network problem often. The Wi-Fi in the boys' hostel is worse. The quality of food is good but sometimes bad. There is only one canteen, and the food items are above MRP.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Me and my wonderful college.

content.Placements: Almost all students are placed in our college. The companies coming for placements are CRPF Ajmer (Rajasthan), the Income Tax Department (Mumbai), and Shapoorji Pallonji Integrated Solutions Pvt. Ltd. The highest package is 4.24 LPA, and the average package is 3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of our college is very good with good buildings and well-equipped Wi-Fi classes. We have well-equipped laboratories for us like horticulture lab, ergonomics lab, entomology lab, etc., which help us to learn all the practical that we require for the future.

admission_overview.title: RNB Global University Admissions Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: RNB Global University admissions are primarily entrance-based depending upon different courses. The university accepts entrance exam scores such as CUET, JEE, XAT, CLAT, etc. It offers courses at both UG and PG levels in multiple domains such as Management, Architecture, Mass Communication, Engineering, Law, etc. Interested candidates can apply both offline and online. RNB Global University also conducts the RNBGU Aptitude & Proficiency Test (RNBGUAPT) itself, for which candidates have to appear. However, this can be exempted if the candidates have a good score in other entrance exams accepted by the university for different courses.

Candidates must pass class 12 to apply for UG courses and at least a UG degree for postgraduate courses. It is also mandatory to appear for the for RNBGU Aptitude & Proficiency Test (RNBGUAPT) if the candidate does not have a valid score of any other national-level entrance exam. admission_process.title: RNB Global University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: RNB Global University offers admission to candidates in various courses at UG and PG level. The university accepts entrance exams like CUET, CLAT, MAT, JEE, etc. If the candidate has not appeared in any of the entrance exams or doesn’t have a valid score, it is mandatory to appear for the for RNBGU Aptitude and Proficiency Test (RNBGUAPT). Candidates are then called for a PI round. The detailed procedure is given below:
RNB Global University Registration Process

Applicants who are eligible can apply both online and offline. The application forms are available on the institute’s official website. Candidates can download the form, attach all the necessary documents and submit it on the website itself or to the admission cell. There is an application fee of INR 1,100 which the candidates are required to pay for successfully submitting the form.
RNB Global University Selection Criteria

The selection criteria for RNBGU is different for different courses. Candidates are selected for majority of the courses on the basis of their performance in the entrance exams accepted. The university also conducts the RNBGU Aptitude and Proficiency Test (RNBGUAPT) itself, for which the candidates have to appear, if they haven’t in any of the other accepted exams. A PI round is also conducted for admission.
Admission call and confirmation of seat

Once the selection formalities are completed the candidate’s performance is reviewed on the basis of the entrance score’s and PI round, and then the admission is granted. It is mandatory to pay an enrolment fee to the university which is usually INR 10,000 (non-refundable).
RNB Global University Fees 2025

RNB Global University offers courses at both UG and Level. Candidates need to pay the require course enrolment fee to secure admission to the university. This must be done in the given timeline to avoid any confusion later on.RNB Global University feesvaries from different courses. Below is the detailed breakdown: -

faqs.question: Does RNB Global University offer better placements than JECRC University?
faqs.answer: RNB Global University and JECRC University's placement records are pretty similar. When comparing placements at RNB Global University and JECRC University, several factors, such as industry ties and student achievement, can produce different results. Because of its well-established network and reputation, JECRC University sometimes has a superior placement record. Good placements are also available from RNB Global University; nonetheless, it is advisable to study recent placement records from both universities for precise specifics.

faqs.question: What is the fee for pursuing PhD at RNB Global University?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee of PhD at RNB Global University is around INR 2.9 - 3.6 lakh. The hostel fees, security deposits and other fees if any are separate. RNBGU offers candidate PhD course in three different specialisations. These include Commerce and Management, Law and Arts, Basic and Applied Sciences.

reviews.review_heading: Good choice for BBA in HRM with supportive teachers and a peaceful campus.
reviews.review_text: The university campus is clean and peaceful, which is good for studying. Classrooms are well-maintained with proper seating and projectors for presentation. The library is helpful for every student to access online resources. Hostel rooms are decent and cleaned regularly. Mess food is fine on most days but sometimes can be improved. There is Wi-Fi in the hostel and academic blocks, but the speed drops sometimes. I like spending time in the library and the lawns.

reviews.review_heading: Modern campus, supportive faculty, and decent placement at RNBGU Bikaner.
reviews.review_text: The campus is modern and quite well-maintained. My department has Wi-Fi enabled, a smart classroom, a dedicated computer lab, seminar halls, and a good library with updated books and digital resources. The hostel is comfortable - rooms are spacious and cleaned regularly. The mess food is hygienic, though the taste can be repetitive sometimes. There's a canteen and the medical room has a nurse and basic first aid. For sports, there's a big ground, basketball, volleyball, badminton court, and indo...

reviews.review_heading: It is the best university to pursue the B.A course in Rajasthan.
reviews.review_text: We have smart classrooms with a projector and fully air-conditioned, and a fire alarm and extinguishing system. We have a great Wi-Fi connection with the central library and digital library with a collection of books for every type and every topic. We also have daily newspapers of minimum 5 types and different types of magazines and journals. The hostel of the university is made in such a way that students feel comfortable with a homely environment with a lot of storage area, a study table, a ch...

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of RNB Global University.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities are good, except for the Wi-Fi in the boys' hostel, which is worse. There are certain restrictions on Wi-Fi, and since our college is on the outskirts of Bikaner. There is a network problem often. The Wi-Fi in the boys' hostel is worse. The quality of food is good but sometimes bad. There is only one canteen, and the food items are above MRP.

reviews.review_heading: Me and my wonderful college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is very good with good buildings and well-equipped Wi-Fi classes. We have well-equipped laboratories for us like horticulture lab, ergonomics lab, entomology lab, etc., which help us to learn all the practical that we require for the future.

reviews.review_heading: My wonderful college and I.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good, with good buildings and Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms. We have well-equipped laboratories for us, like the horticulture lab, agronomy lab, entomology lab, etc., which help us to learn all the practicals that we require for the future.

reviews.review_heading: All is well in this college.
reviews.review_text: The rooms of hostel are well furnished and have air-conditioning for students.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: In every classroom, we have Wi-Fi facilities. We have giant libraries, and specialized designed labs for pathology, entomology, and all other courses. We have teachers for every subject. For the exams, two sessional exams take place and one end-semester exam.

reviews.review_heading: A journey of growth and my college experience.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi facility is excellent, and the food quality in the mess is good. The hostel amenities are well-maintained, and the security measures are effective. The libraries are designed thoughtfully, providing us with a wide variety of books on various subjects. The overall environment is very pleasant, with separate facilities for boys and girls.

reviews.review_heading: Good and bad situations, memorable college.
reviews.review_text: All our classrooms are fully equipped with Wi-Fi, and we have a large library filled with numerous books. Our laboratories are fully equipped as well, and the hostel also provides Wi-Fi with excellent cleanliness maintained by the staff. The food in the mess is of high quality, and proper hygiene is ensured by the vendors.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides good placements and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Agriculture in the B.Sc. program offers excellent facilities at this university, including specialized labs for each agricultural subject. The university also provides good medical facilities, and students have access to Wi-Fi in every classroom. Meals are available on campus, contributing to a supportive educational environment.

reviews.review_heading: More than just a degree, reflection on my college years.
reviews.review_text: Our college is fully equipped with Wi-Fi in every classroom. We have specialized labs for all subjects whether it is entomology, horticulture, soil science, plant pathology, or biotechnology. This helps us gain all the practical knowledge that is required in the future.

reviews.review_heading: Overall satisfied with my university. I made some great friends.
reviews.review_text: In every classroom, we have Wi-Fi facilities, we have giant libraries, and specialized designed labs for pathology, entomology, and all other courses. We have specialized teachers for every subject. As for the exams two sessional exams take place and one end-semester exam.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of RNB Global University, pros and cons.
reviews.review_text: The structure of the course is very good. Since I am a scholar, I don't know much about the hostel, but I have heard from my colleagues and students who stay in the hostel. They say the hostel facilities are also very good, and the food which you have, they provided a very good

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the academics and curriculum experience and good. I recommend taking admission here.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is top notch with different building for academics, administration, and fun zones. The classes are fully air-conditioned with a central AC system. The students get a student zone to rest between the classes where they can eat at cafeteria, play in games room, and exercise at gym. If not to go there they can read books at our vast library with a numerous amount of books that are too fully air-conditioned or complete your assignments. The university offers free Wi-Fi with high speed...

college_info.college_name: RNB Global University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Yes, RNB Global University offers scholarships for Integrated BA-LLB and Integrated BBA-LLB100% Scholarships: 95% & above in class XII or 90% & above in RBFST or AIR upto 5000 in CLAT or 90 Percentile & Above in LSAT or 95 Percentile & Above in CUET.
Candidates who meet the above mentioned requirements can apply for admissions to the course.
Candidates who get the final admission offer are eligible to pay the course fee. Check out the table below to learn more about the fee of the courses on offer:

RNB Global University offers various scholarships for BCom students, including merit-based waivers (15%–40%), a 10% girl child scholarship, sibling scholarships, area-specific scholarships, and support for defence personnel, sports achievers, and financially needy students. Early applicants and Young Achiever Award recipients may also be eligible for additional benefits.

RNB Global University has a bunch of scholarships lined up for BBA students. These include merit-based waivers from 15% to 40% if you've scored 60% or above in Class 12. Plus, there are special 10% scholarships for girls, siblings of existing students, local area residents, defence backgrounds, sports achievers, early applicants, and Young Achievers.

highlights.summary:
The TNEA 2026 counselling application window is expected to launch in the first week of May 2026 for Parisutham Institute of Technology and Science admission to BE/BTech courses.

A few more updates are given below:

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied to study the course at this college, and I enjoyed it.

review_content.Placements: Many students will be placed on campus. The highest salary offered is Rs. 50,000 per month and the lowest salary offered is about Rs. 25,000 per month. Top recruiting companies of our college are Tech Mahindra, TCS, etc. Students are offered with managing roles. In our course, the minimum salary offered is about Rs. 25,000 per month. Nearly 90% of the students got an internship in various companies like Neyveli Lignite Corporation, Kerala Automobiles, Ashok Leyland, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the hostel and also campus is good. Wi-Fi is provided on our campus. They provide high-quality foods, and lots of games are available on our campus. They have separate seating arrangements for girls and boys in the canteen. They also provide quick first-aid and medicine for any injuries.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: The college has many rules for students to follow.

review_content.Placements: Placements were rarely provided in our college. Only small companies like BPO and insurance sector visited our campus to recruit students. It would be better if the college invites some good companies which offer good salary packages. You should have skills to get placed instead of depending upon the college. Aptitude training sessions are conducted in the college. Only 20% of the students got placed. The highest salary offered was Rs. 20,000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is available on the campus which students can avail from 3rd year. Students were not allowed to use mobile phones in the college. Labs were good and well-maintained. Sports and games facilities were good. Students in classrooms always feel like sitting inside the oven during the summer season. The food offered was average. The mobile signals in the hostels were poor.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I was pretty satisfied because of the friendly behavior of every faculty member and so on.

content.Placements: About 99% were placed with a decent package offered for all the courses. TCL, Wipro, and Just Daily were some of the companies that recruit. Everything is truly based on yourself. You can also get placement from outside the campus by visiting the company you like.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is only provided for college systems; there were several labs with AC's. But some systems might be in bad condition. Classrooms are pretty good, though! More books are available in libraries, but only a few are in the same edition. I'm not sure about the hostel, but the food available in the mess is not good, but you can get some good snacks from the canteen. Sports are good here. Like football, tennis, ect.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with studies, good placements, infrastructure, and facilities.

content.Placements: Around 85% of students are placed in our course. The highest salary pacakge offered is 1.9 LPA, the minimum salary offered is Rs 60,000. The lowest salary offered is Rs 20,000. Infosys is the top recruiting company. Around 70% of students have placed on-campus interviews and get high-salary jobs.
content.Infrastructure: It has Wi-Fi all over the college including in hostels. It also provides all kinds of laboratories for all departments students, and the classrooms are neat. The library facility is also good, because the library has all kinds of books for all departments.

Nearly 90% of the students got an internship in various companies like Neyveli Lignite Corporation, Kerala Automobiles, Ashok Leyland, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the hostel and also campus is good. Wi-Fi is provided on our campus. They provide high-quality foods, and lots of games are available on our campus. They have separate seating arrangements for girls and boys in the canteen. They also provide quick first-aid and medicine for any injuries.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: The college has many rules for students to follow.

content.Placements: Placements were rarely provided in our college. Only small companies like BPO and insurance sector visited our campus to recruit students. individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Aeronautical Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Placements in our college were good.

content.Placements: Aelous from Bangalore has visited our college to recruit the students. Only three students from our batch were selected, and it was a very tough interview. Only two students from our senior batch got placed because only the students with good communication skills are being placed. Students should speak only in English on the campus. They also conduct discussions to improve the communication skills of students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was wonderful. They also provide facilities like library, basketball court, volleyball court, table tennis, gym etc. The atmosphere in the library is good, a lot of books are available in the library. It has different sections for the students to sit and read books. We were supposed to use books according to the department.

reviews.review_heading: I was pretty satisfied because of the friendly behavior of every faculty member and so on.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is only provided for college systems; there were several labs with AC's. But some systems might be in bad condition. Classrooms are pretty good, though! More books are available in libraries, but only a few are in the same edition. I'm not sure about the hostel, but the food available in the mess is not good, but you can get some good snacks from the canteen. Sports are good here. Like football, tennis, ect.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with studies, good placements, infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: It has Wi-Fi all over the college including in hostels. It also provides all kinds of laboratories for all departments students, and the classrooms are neat. The library facility is also good, because the library has all kinds of books for all departments.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied to study the course at this college, and I enjoyed it.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the hostel and also campus is good. Wi-Fi is provided on our campus. They provide high-quality foods, and lots of games are available on our campus. They have separate seating arrangements for girls and boys in the canteen. They also provide quick first-aid and medicine for any injuries.

reviews.review_heading: The college has many rules for students to follow.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available on the campus which students can avail from 3rd year. Students were not allowed to use mobile phones in the college. Labs were good and well-maintained. Sports and games facilities were good. Students in classrooms always feel like sitting inside the oven during the summer season. The food offered was average. The mobile signals in the hostels were poor.

reviews.review_heading: Placements in our college were good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was wonderful. They also provide facilities like library, basketball court, volleyball court, table tennis, gym etc. The atmosphere in the library is good, a lot of books are available in the library. It has different sections for the students to sit and read books. We were supposed to use books according to the department.

reviews.review_heading: My opinion about my college.
reviews.review_text: The college provides Wi-Fi and the labs available here are good. The hostel is also good and maintained clean. The quality of food provided in the mess is good and the fees they charge are also less.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Sanjay Gandhi Institute of Dairy Technology is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. review_content.Placements: Comfed, Amul, Mother Dairy, Sudha, Jivika, etc., visit our campus every year. Students got a salary package of 8 LPA. All students got placed in good companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. There is a model dairy plant on campus. It is based on Vidhya Dairy Model. It trains students and farmers in the production of milk and milk-based products. Our campus has excellent infrastructure with greenery.
review_content.Faculty: All faculty members are good. They are Ph.D. holders. They have industry exposure. We have to write the BCECE examination. Our college is affiliated with BASU.

college_info.college_name: NIILM University

highlights.summary:
PhD 2023 application was closed on Aug 26 and the entrance exam was held on Aug 27. Further, admissions 2023-24 are open to DPharma.

Established in 2011 by the Haryana State Legislature under Haryana Act No. 16, NIILM University is based in Kaithal, Haryana. It is a private university which has gained approval from the University Grants Commission (UGC) and has been accredited by National Assessment and Accreditation Council (NAAC). It offers multi-disciplinary courses at undergraduate, postgraduate, doctoral and diploma level in diverse streams like Engineering and Technology, Science, Commerce, Business Administration, Computer Application and Legal Studies.

The University comprises seven schools offering courses across specialisations like Agriculture and Forestry, Law, Hotel Management and Tourism, Applied Science, Mass Media and Communication, Management and Fashion Technology. Additionally, it consists of three faculty namely Faculty of Education, Faculty of Art & Languages and Faculty of Social Sciences.

The process of NIILM University admission 2020 is conducted in both online as well as offline modes.  Admission to courses are either done on the basis of merit, score in national-level or University-conducted entrance exams. Details regarding eligibility criteria for different courses are shared below:

Note: The University conducts its own entrance exam and details can be checked at the official website.

NIILM University offers undergraduate and postgraduate programmes with varied durations. It provides a four-year BTech programme along with three-year duration courses like BTech (Lateral Entry), LLB, BSc, BCom, BBA and MCA. Other PG courses like MSc, MCom and MBA are of two years whereas BALLB at the UG level is of five years. The doctoral level course i.e. PhD can be opted in full-time/ part-time/ off-campus modes as per students’ preference.

All these courses are covered across specialisations like Engineering, Management, Law, Commerce, Science, Humanities & Arts, Fashion, Hospitality, Mass Media & Communication, Computer Applications, Education, and Agriculture. The University also offers diploma courses of 18-month duration in Agriculture, Hotel Management, Food Production, Home Keeping, Front Office, Food & Beverage Service.

Below listed are some of the popular NIILM University courses along with their eligibility and fee structure:

NIILM University Placements

As per the information available on the official university website, topmost recruiters who participated in NIILM University placements 2019 and hired hotel management students include Crown Plaza, MSG Hotel, Radisson Ludhiana, Hotel Arista, Grace Hotel Kaithal, Omaxe, Aviva, Fortune, Amar Valley, Country Inn Suits, The Bristol Gurgaon, RJ Hotel & Resort, Ramada, to name a few.

Note: The official website of University college has no information regarding the placement success rate and salary packages offered to students in recent years.

Check out details on NIILM University Placements

NIILM University Scholarships are offered to both economically-weak and meritorious students. The University offers a Fee Waiver Scheme to aid students and also assist them in securing educational loans from nationalised banks at nominal interest rate.
