individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Atlast not so good, so don't take admission here.

content.Placements: Forget the word placements while taking admission in NIIM University, Kaithal because there is a special system for students taking admission here. The placements are at a good level only for hotel management, but not for B.Tech or MBA, in which they provide placement assistance to students. I think according to a general student, who passed out from there, he will suggest you, to take an admission there for MBA if you're capable of cracking the MBA entrance examination.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average because classrooms are not furnished, and when you look into the campus to see the infrastructure, you can judge how much standards are maintained and what they're developing in the university. Wi-Fi facility is not available to student's devices; it means no liberty on the internet uses for the students. About library, it is average, not more than this because when you need the particular book for your exam or reading purpose that wouldn't be there in enough quantity.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure is so good and the campus is also very good.

content.Placements: I myself Prateek Srivastava completed my B.Tech degree from NIILM University Kaithal Haryana. The best college life I have enjoyed here. Suppose total of 25-27% of students are placed in my course. The highest package is around 49 LPA, and the lowest salary is 8 LPA. Top recruiter companies for my course are LNT and HCL. 100% of students got internships in all around recruiter companies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is so good and the campus is also very good. The campus is full of air conditioning and Wi-Fi. There are several labs and libraries.

paragraphs: NIILM University conducts its admission process on the basis of merit scores. The university offers various courses to students at the UG, PG and Certificate levels.

For online admission, candidates can complete the application form, available on the official website of the university. For offline process, students can check the admission cell of the university. The university offers courses in streams like Engineering, Medicine and Health Sciences, Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Accounting and Commerce, Law, Humanities and Social Sciences, Hospitality and Travel, Science, Teaching and Education and Nursing, etc. Candidates who are eligible for admission at NIILM University must pay a fee ranging between INR 12,000 and 3,20,000.

faqs.question: Is direct admission available at NIILM University?
faqs.answer: Yes, NIILM University offer direct admission. Admission to both UG and PG programmess is merit-based. Candidates are evaluated on their scores in Class 12. hostel_campus.college_name: NIILM University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The Hostel accommodation is spacious, fully furnished and has temperature controlled rooms with plenty of storage space, round-the-clock janitorial services, power backup and 24- hour clean drinking water, Internet connectivity through Wi-Fi system, Facilities for indoor and outdoor games like Table tennis, Badminton, Football, Basket Ball, Volleyball, Lawn Tennis, Cricket, Hockey etc, L.C.D. TV in each hostel block, Campus clinic with ambulance to provide medical assistance to students, 24 x 7, Hygienic mess facility with vegetarian meals only, Two wheelers may be allowed for hostel residents after approval from authorities (Four wheelers are strictly prohibited), 24 hours security, Gymnasium facility, Laundry facility (optional on payment basis), Tuck shops to cater to all needs of the students at all hours and Availability of Newspapers and Magazines. There is a separate hostel facility for boys and girls within the campus. Hostel accommodation would be allotted strictly on ‘first come first served ‘ basis. Recreational rooms equipped with television, newspapers and comfortable seating are an instant hit with all residents.

faqs.answer: According to the Apollo Institute of Engineering and Technology's qualifying criteria for candidates to appear for the GUJCET Exam, students must have a minimum of 45% in class 12th if they belong to an unreserved category. However, candidates from the reserved category must have a grade point average of 40% in class 12. Candidates applying for GUJCET must review the entire GUJCET eligibility criteria before filling out the application form.Candidates who do not meet the GUJCET eligibility standards will not be considered for admission as per the norms given by Gujarat Secondary and Higher Secondary Education Board (GSEB).The various conditions of eligibility for GUJCET 2024 as per Gujarat Secondary and Higher Secondary Education Board are · The candidate must be an Indian and should have a Gujarat domicile.· The candidates should have passed or appeared for Class 12 or equivalent.· The candidate must have studied Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics/ Physics, Chemistry, and Biology as the main subject for pharmacy.· The candidate must have studied Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics as the main subject for Engineering.· Candidates should have scored 45% (40% for the reserved category) in Class 12.

content.Placements: Placements offered at our college are average. Companies visiting our college are small organizations or LLPs. Generally, the average salary package offered ranges from 2 LPA - 3 LPA. Many students do not get placements. Just few students get placed and companies offer bonds which are not suitable for every student.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of my college is too large. There is so greenery around my college. The campus is covered by medium-capacity Wi-Fi. There is a large ground and a basketball court is also available at my college. Canteen facility is also available at my college. Canteen area is medium not so large or small. The food offered by the canteen is good.

content.Placements: Currently, I'm in the 4th semester, but some of my friends and seniors are in the higher semester, and some are passing out, so this is normal in our college placement; not so huge companies are coming; small companies are coming for the hiring. And in terms of percentage, 30–40% of students got placed with the help of a college, whereas in other cases, they were searching for a good company and doing it by themselves. And most companies are coming from IT backgrounds. An AVG package at our college is around 3.4 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Class rooms are pretty good; in fact, this year, the college has done all the renovation of classrooms and cabins. And if you want a PG or hostel for living, you just have to ask in the college admin office, and then they will provide information.

reviews_list.batch_info: Integrated B.Tech. in Aeronautical Engineering + Aircraft Maintenance Engineering (AME) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: All about the School of Aeronautics.

review_content.Placements: Top recruiting companies for my course are Indigo and Airbus. Top roles offered are A.M.E. in B1 mechanical stream and B2 avionics stream. Probably 80 to 85 percent of students got placement. Some roles also include manufacturing of airplanes and designing of airplanes.
review_content.Infrastructure: In the hostel, the facilities are good. They have fully whitewashed walls, air conditioning in good condition, and there are servants for cleaning as well. They have laundry service too. In classrooms, the labs are very good and clean, and all apparatus are in working condition. The Wi-Fi is not that good in the hostel, but in college, the Wi-Fi is good. For sports and games, they don't have that many facilities. There are only a few sports like cricket, table tennis, and badminton.

reviews_list.batch_info: Integrated B.Tech. in Aeronautical Engineering + Aircraft Maintenance Engineering (AME) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The college has good infrastructure and location, but the faculty, mess and placements are not nice.

review_content.Placements: The placements in this college are below average. The companies only take 4 to 5 students from a batch of 60 to 70 students which is very bad. Companies like Indigo and Air India visit for campus drive but offer only 15 to 17 thousand for a 2 years’ bond which is very low because in a span of 4 years you will approximately pay the college around 15 to 20 lacs as fee.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has 2 hostels for boys, one is in the academic block and the other is in the hostel block. There is one hostel for girls as well. The college also has a mess with proper seating arrangements but the food quality is below average, it’s not like your home food.

review_summary.college_name: School of Aeronautics, Neemrana Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Integrated B.Tech. in Aeronautical Engineering + Aircraft Maintenance Engineering (AME) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Best placement offers but not knowledge and discipline management.

content.Placements: Above 75% of students are placed in my course in top airlines like Air India, Indigo, and SpiceJet. Top manufacturing companies like Boieng and Airbus. Top roles offered as a fresher, like HR, human factor recruiter, quality manager, etc. Students also get internship opportunities but it is based on our own reference.
content.Infrastructure: It has good hostel and course related infrastructure like labs and academic block. Campus is small but there is a beautiful ground and park but lack of aircraft parts and components for real experience. It provides good classroom, seminar hall, and exception area or course related labs. Computer library and library are also there.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Aeronautical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: A short critic review of School of Aeronautics.

content.Placements: This college has a placement record of more than 90% ensuring the job offers roles of fight dispatcher, aircraft maintenance engineer, drone pilot, cabin crew, data management, and simulator jobs. Top companies like Airbus, FSTC, Capgemini, and Sky come here along with airlines like Indigo.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel infrastructures are older and the quality of mess food is average. Girls have only one block but for boys, the block is been divided into hostel block and an academic block. Rooms are decent and for the academic block there are no attached washrooms but in the hostel block, there are attached washrooms for the four-seater rooms.

individual_reviews.course: Integrated B.Tech. in Aeronautical Engineering + Aircraft Maintenance Engineering (AME) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: All about the School of Aeronautics.

content.Placements: Top recruiting companies for my course are Indigo and Airbus. Top roles offered are A.M.E. in B1 mechanical stream and B2 avionics stream. Probably 80 to 85 percent of students got placement. Some roles also include manufacturing of airplanes and designing of airplanes.
content.Infrastructure: In the hostel, the facilities are good. They have fully whitewashed walls, air conditioning in good condition, and there are servants for cleaning as well. They have laundry service too. In classrooms, the labs are very good and clean, and all apparatus are in working condition. The Wi-Fi is not that good in the hostel, but in college, the Wi-Fi is good. For sports and games, they don't have that many facilities. There are only a few sports like cricket, table tennis, and badminton.

individual_reviews.course: Integrated B.Tech. in Aeronautical Engineering + Aircraft Maintenance Engineering (AME) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college has good infrastructure and location, but the faculty, mess and placements are not nice.

content.Placements: The placements in this college are below average. The companies only take 4 to 5 students from a batch of 60 to 70 students which is very bad. Companies like Indigo and Air India visit for campus drive but offer only 15 to 17 thousand for a 2 years’ bond which is very low because in a span of 4 years you will approximately pay the college around 15 to 20 lacs as fee.
content.Infrastructure: The college has 2 hostels for boys, one is in the academic block and the other is in the hostel block. There is one hostel for girls as well. The college also has a mess with proper seating arrangements but the food quality is below average, it’s not like your home food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Aeronautical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of management staff.

content.Placements: Only 30% of my course mates were able to get jobs at Indigo and other airlines, with the highest package being 3 lakhs per annum and the average being 2 lakhs per annum. Most of the placements required a bond agreement, and the salary was not enough to help students start their careers. Despite these challenges, everyone tried hard, and a few of us were successful.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities are sufficient for our field knowledge. They have all the necessary labs, but the lack of lab instructors is an issue. The college area is not too big, so it can get congested at times. Also, the management doesn't seem to care about many of the students' issues.

admission_overview.college_name: School of Aeronautics, Neemrana Admission 2025: Application Process, Eligibility, Courses & Fee

admission_process.title: SoA Neemrana Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: School of Aeronautics (SoA), Neemrana admissionis based on the entrance exam conducted by the SoA. School of Aeronautics offers courses in Aeronautical Engineering, Aircraft Maintenance Engineering & Mechatronics Engineering. The popular course of the school is Aircraft Maintenance Engineering (AME), which is approved by the Directorate General of Civil Aviation (DGCA). Apart from AME, SoA also offers a Licence Programme, namely Aircraft Maintenance Engineering (DGCA/ EASA). Also, it offers a few professional courses. Read more about School of Aeronautics admission 2025 below:

Candidates applying to the school may be invited for a PI round/ written test, depending on the number of applications received. Here are the eligibility and selection of the courses offered by SoA Neemrana admission 2025:
SoA Neemrana course admissions 2025 for all of its courses are done based on merit and entrance exams conducted by the School of Aeronautics. Check below the complete SoA admission process:
Application:
The mode of application is online. Candidates must register online and then fill out the online application form.
Selection rounds:
Appear for the college-based entrance exam, SOACET followed by selection rounds.Students may be called for an Interview/SOACET Exam, depending on the number of applications received.
Admission confirmation:
If the student qualifies in the Interview/SOACET Exam a seat is provided to him/her & he/she will be required to pay the admission fee within the stipulated time.

reviews.review_heading: Facts of School of Aeronautics.
reviews.review_text:
The facilities and infrastructure available for the course department are: Wi-Fi is available in the hostels and classrooms, which have an AC library and have almost all the books in the library.
The quality of the facilities in hostel is good. The food is good in the canteen, and medical facilities are also available Sports and games are also available .

reviews.review_heading: Review of School of Aeronautics, Neemrana.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is really good, with various labs, well-ventilated classrooms, and a conditioned library that has mainly every book that a student requires for his/her course. The hostel accommodation is also good, with AC and non-AC rooms. Sports like cricket, table tennis, football, volleyball, etc. are also available. Mess food is really hygienic and tasty.

reviews.review_heading: Very good college for students aspiring to become aeronautical engineers. The placement is good too.
reviews.review_text: Labs are there for different subjects. Classrooms are spacious. Many books are available in library and rooms are also there to study. The hostel is safe and well maintained. The canteen is neat and clean. A medical facility is available 24/7. A badminton court, table tennis court, volleyball court, and grounds for cricket and football are available.

reviews.review_heading: Reviewing the School of Aeronautics, Neemrana.
reviews.review_text: The college has a nice infrastructure. The canteen food is of good quality. Sports facilities like badminton, table tennis, carrom, and chess are provided. Safety of all the students is made sure of. If any student falls sick, the warden of the respective hostels take them to the hospital immediately.

reviews.review_heading: College is good but it has flaws.
reviews.review_text: If I talk about the course, it is definitely good and you should explore it, but if I talk about the hostel, it is fair, like there is a water issue sometimes. The warden is strict and you have to face him everyday. You will find some reviews saying that the college is best in everything, those are fake, because every college and university has their own flaws which creates a difficulty if you don't understand to separate the genuine reviews.

Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. faqs.question: Q: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?

faqs.answer: Dear candidate, the subject of Machine Design basically teaches you about the designing fundamentals of various types of machinery across industries. Have a good day.

answer.text: If we look at the market demand, no doubt there is huge demand for BTech (Full Form: Bachelor of Technology) graduates among top recruiters who are constantly looking for skilled and knowledgeable students with fresh ideas to enhance their business growth and profitability.Having said that, a few previous-year employment reports published by the Business Standard and Times of India suggest that students found it a struggle to land a high-paying job after completing BTech because of a lack of industry-specific skills and knowledge and cut-throat competition between Lacs of engineering students hunting for a job.Hence, it is very important for students to focus on enhancing their skill set according to industrial demands and technological advancements, stay updated regarding all industry trends, build good networks and, most importantly, take up internships to gain experience and stand out in front of the employer.Read more: B Tech Jobs in India

faqs.question: Is there enough demand for BTech graduates in the job market?

answer.text: Yes, Electronics Engineers are also recruited by the DRDO. The organisation releases notification in case of any requirement or vacancy in the pertinent discipline. The recruitement to DRDO is done on the basis of an open-recruitment process which attracts the brightest minds and experienced candidates from the country.

faqs.question: Can an Electronics Engineer get a job in DRDO?

answer.text: After completing MTech, a candidate can easily find a job in research and development companies, manufacturing firms, and IT companies as Project Manager, Research Associate, and Senior Engineers. Some of the candidates also prefer academic jobs such as teaching in a college or becoming a professor. Candidates can also work as Lead Scientist, Lead Engineer and also work as consultants in popular organisations.Know more about -MTech Courses

faqs.question: What are the different job profiles offered to an M.Tech graduate?

answer.text: The average annual salary of a Mechanical Engineer in India is somewhere around INR 5 LPA to INR 10 LPA. Most of the private and government organizations extend good salary offers to talented candidates who they feel can contribute to the growing field of mechanics and serve as an asset for their business.In todays world there are new technological innovations and emerging trends every day. Individuals with a relevant mechanical skill set are in high demand. Hence BTech Mechanical Engineering graduates get paid quite well from the beginning itself.

reviews_list.review_title: Our college has a good reputation and a good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Around 10% of the students get placed in the college. The highest salary package offered was 6 LPA and the lowest salary package offered was 3.5 LPA. Cummins India is the top recruiter of our college. Around 70% of the students got internships. Roles offered are mostly as trainee engineers in MNCs across all the sectors like automobile, IT, defense, hospitality, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides Wi-Fi for educational purposes only. Our classrooms are fully digital. The library is full of all the equipment. The quality of the food provided in the canteen is very good and hygienic, and it follows all the protocols. We have a neat and clean canteen.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: The college has good infrastructure but below-average faculty members.

review_content.Placements: The college doesn't offer placements to students. Most of the students got placed on their own. Few students from other trades (computer, electronics and telecommunications) got jobs with a package of 2.5 to 3 Lacs per annum.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is decent, but the labs are below average with less equipment. Wi-Fi is available for every student (1GB per day). There are medium size classrooms with good ventilation. There is a big playground in front of the college. The canteen is very bad, and the food quality is below average.

The students are allowed to participate in an internship with a maximum of 7 CGPA. The faculty gives advice and learn that how to give an interview.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities of the classroom are excellent, with a smart board and smart class. A library is available with 30000 books. All PC have Wi-Fi features and the lab has AC. The food in the canteen is good because they hire Anand Cafe. Food has a normal price, and there is an experience of sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: he place where all your dreams come true.

content.Placements: The placement offers here are very good. The companies that visit this college are well-known. The college trains students on how to prepare for job interviews or mock rounds, and they also help us build our resumes during job placements.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are very good. They are very friendly and clear out doubts easily and quickly. Not only do they clear doubts, but they also help us in learning every subject. Apart from the faculty members, the peons of the college are very friendly in nature, and they operate very effectively.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The college has a good campus.

content.Placements: 70-80 students are placed in the course, and students are good; all students are interested in this course. Every year, juniors come to college, attendance is compulsory, and exams are also compulsory. The college background is good, and the nature is good.
content.Infrastructure: The course and hostel are good. Hostel rooms and bathrooms are clean; water coolers are available, and they work properly. The college has 7 main buildings, and all the buildings are big and for different courses. Canteen food is average but not good. I don't like canteen food.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Overall, this college is very nice.

content.Placements: In this batch, 60-70 students are available. This course is good for students to have a good career and a good life. This course demand is very high. And every year, new students come to this college. And every year, this course batch is full of students.
content.Infrastructure: This college's infrastructure is very nice, and this course is also very nice. I like this course. This college's hostel is very clean and good. Hostel rooms and bathrooms are clean, and in the hostel, the water is very clean. All facilities are good in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college is very good.

content.Placements: Almost 80% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered is 5 LPA. The top recruiting company is TCL. Top roles offered are manager, supervisor, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are huge for our studies. There are many labs and workshops for our projects. Our college offers high-speed Wi-Fi for students. Our college canteen offers good and hygienic food for students. Medical facilities are available in our college.
content.Faculty: Our faculty members are very intelligent, friendly, and polite. They are qualified from the best universities. They help us a lot in our studies, and we can clear our exams easily because of them. They teach us after college time also.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Placements are not available in this college.

review_content.Placements: There is no placement for the students of MBA. No internship is available for us. A maximum of 5% students have been placed by the college and 10% students have received quality jobs. Maximum salary is 15k per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no proper seminar hall for the students. A library is available in the college and lab facilities are also there. Lab rooms are small and canteen is very bad. There is no proper infra in the college. AC is not available in the canteen.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The campus has a multicultural environment with students coming from many states and countries.

review_content.Placements: The structure of the B.Tech CSE course is good, including theory and practicals. The highest salary package offered in our course is 5 LPA, the lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA, and the average salary package offered is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Wipro and IBM. About 60% of the total students got an internship in companies like Wipro and IBM.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is pretty basic, but it is overall good or average. Facilities like computer labs, library, and some other labs are available here, and Wi-Fi is available on the whole campus. The classrooms are pretty decent. The hostel is average, but the rooms are not that good. The quality of food is basic and average. Medical facilities are very poor, and the sports and games facilities are average.

An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. faqs.answer: Dear candidate, the subject of Machine Design basically teaches you about the designing fundamentals of various types of machinery across industries. Have a good day.

overview_faqs.question: Is Quest Group of Institutions a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Quest Group of Institutions is a reputed institute for B.Com, B.Tech, BBA, BCA, BHMTT, M.Sc., MBA/PGDM. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Accounting & Commerce, Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Hospitality & Travel, Science. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Quest Group of Institutions has a review rating of 3.2 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.2 on campuslife, 2.7 on placements, 3.8 on faculty and 3.2 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Quest Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com. Professional) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with my college as it offers the best services.

content.Placements: For now, there are no placements because we have not yet graduated. The highest package is 10 lakh per annum. The average package is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are HDFC Bank, Axis Bank, PwC, etc. As of now, there are no internships. The top roles offered are accountant, financial analyst, tax consultancy, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are very good and are of standard. We have well-equipped labs and clean classrooms. Hostels are very good and hygienic. They make sure that they clean them often. The food is well prepared and is perfect.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is the best engineering college in Chandigarh.

content.Placements: About 25% of students are placed in our course. The highest salary offered is Rs. 25000 per month, the lowest is Rs. 15000 per month to Rs. 16000 per month, and the average is Rs. 18000 per month to Rs. 20000 per month. There are top recruiting companies. Students get placements in HR and finance departments.
content.Infrastructure: Everything is good. All the facilities are available. The food in the canteen is good and healthy.
content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable. The teaching quality is good. The course curriculum is relevant. It makes students industry-ready. If students prepare well, they pass the exams.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Placements are not available in this college.

content.Placements: There is no placement for the students of MBA. No internship is available for us. A maximum of 5% students have been placed by the college and 10% students have received quality jobs. Maximum salary is 15k per month.
content.Infrastructure: There is no proper seminar hall for the students. A library is available in the college and lab facilities are also there. Lab rooms are small and canteen is very bad. There is no proper infra in the college. AC is not available in the canteen.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The campus has a multicultural environment with students coming from many states and countries.

content.Placements: The structure of the B.Tech CSE course is good, including theory and practicals. The highest salary package offered in our course is 5 LPA, the lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA, and the average salary package offered is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Wipro and IBM. About 60% of the total students got an internship in companies like Wipro and IBM.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is pretty basic, but it is overall good or average. Facilities like computer labs, library, and some other labs are available here, and Wi-Fi is available on the whole campus. The classrooms are pretty decent. The hostel is average, but the rooms are not that good. The quality of food is basic and average. Medical facilities are very poor, and the sports and games facilities are average.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com. Professional) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The experience is too worse in this college.

content.Placements: The placements in quest college are very bad it's like no placements or zero placements. If there are placements then it is of no use. The job will be for 14-15 hours and the payout is only Rs.10000 per month or less than it. According to my personal experience never get admitted to this college.
content.Infrastructure: Quest has only a single building and even that single building is okay. The library has no air-conditioner and fans are not working properly. In the hostel, there is no good food and congested rooms. Even the girls' hostel is about 12km away. It takes 1 hour to reach college.

hostel_campus.college_name: Quest Group of Institutions Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my college as it offers the best services.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are very good and are of standard. We have well-equipped labs and clean classrooms. Hostels are very good and hygienic. They make sure that they clean them often. The food is well prepared and is perfect.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best engineering college in Chandigarh.
reviews.review_text: Everything is good. All the facilities are available. The food in the canteen is good and healthy.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are not available in this college.
reviews.review_text: There is no proper seminar hall for the students. A library is available in the college and lab facilities are also there. Lab rooms are small and canteen is very bad. There is no proper infra in the college. AC is not available in the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: The campus has a multicultural environment with students coming from many states and countries.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is pretty basic, but it is overall good or average. Facilities like computer labs, library, and some other labs are available here, and Wi-Fi is available on the whole campus. The classrooms are pretty decent. The hostel is average, but the rooms are not that good. The quality of food is basic and average. Medical facilities are very poor, and the sports and games facilities are average.

reviews.review_heading: The experience is too worse in this college.
reviews.review_text: Quest has only a single building and even that single building is okay. The library has no air-conditioner and fans are not working properly. In the hostel, there is no good food and congested rooms. Even the girls' hostel is about 12km away. It takes 1 hour to reach college.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the campus life here, and I learned a lot of things.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good and is based on what college takes as a fee. We have Wi-Fi computer labs that are up-dated and what the curriculum demands. Medical facility area is within the college campus. You can spend your time at the college canteen where you can have most of the Punjabi dishes which are hygienically prepared.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average. Our college provides everything we need like a laboratory, computer lab, Wi-Fi and canteen. The hostel is comfortable too, with no electricity cutout with a cooler in every single room. Air-conditioned rooms are also available in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Quest Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good, and the hostel is also good. The hostel has Wi-Fi, coolers and AC. It's good for students. The classrooms are good. The college has a digital library. The mess is not good in this college because they don't provide good quality food, and the charges are high.

reviews.review_heading: The college is value for money, and I recommend it. I am a bit dissatisfied with facilities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is pretty basic, but it is overall good or average. Facilities like computer labs, library and some other labs are available here, and Wi-Fi is available on the whole campus. Classrooms are pretty decent. The hostel is average, but the rooms are not that good. Quilty of food is basic and average. Medical facilities are very poor, and the sports and games facilities are average.

reviews.review_heading: Mechanical engineering is the best course for the overall development of students.
reviews.review_text: All the labs were well-equipped with the instruments. Classrooms have projectors. The campus and hostel are Wi-Fi enabled. Medical assistance is available 24 hours, and a doctor visits the campus every day. The library has a maximum number of books. A digital library is also available. The canteen is clean and well maintained. Food served suites everyone's needs.

reviews.review_heading: My experience at this college is satisfactory. Faculty members are good here.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. The campus is small when compared to other colleges. The labs do not have proper machines, but the electricity facility is available for 24 hours. There is a lack of raw materials in the workshop. The college doesn't have any research lab. There are well-maintained computer labs.

reviews.review_heading: Infra 3/5, Faculty 4/5, Activities 2/5.
reviews.review_text:
Wi-Fi is available (though in the college premises as well as the hostel. Canteen - ask for Pasta, maggi, sandwich, shakes etc. 
Just enough to keep you going through the college hours. Cricket, Volleyball, Basketball, Tennis and football for your pass time. The library has common text books, novels (not many). Mostly deserted! 
There's no 'health Bay' or medical facilities. The classrooms are quite ventilated, only source of cooling - fans. Classrooms are equipped with projectors (rarely used)....

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the experience of my college for me is much better. I have unforgettable memories.
reviews.review_text: Talking about the infrastructure, the main building looks good. It is not a big campus. The hostel facility, Wi-Fi facility, classrooms, and sports are okay. The hostel is good. The campus is small. Only some games you can play out there like basketball, football, tennis, table tennis, volleyball, cricket, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college because of the faculty, placements, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good and attractive. The smart classrooms and the labs are with the latest equipment and materials, which are easily available for testing. The Wi-Fi facility is available on the campus. Every book is easily available in the library. There are the sports facilities for the students.The quality of food in the canteen and mess is good. The hostel rooms are neat and clean. I don't have faced any problem.

reviews.review_heading: Not worthy if you are looking for good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good. The institute is fully furnished and equipped with digital lecture halls and also provides Wi-Fi connectivity all around the campus. The most amazing thing about this college is the practical laboratories are having all the latest equipment. The sports facilities are quite good here. The food and lodging facilities are at par level. The college also provides transport facilities to the day scholar students.

Below are a few more updates related to the Vignana Bharathi Engineering College:

faqs.answer: A:    Vignana Bharathi Engineering College has been rated 3.2 on placements.
faqs.question: How is the placement facility at Vignana Bharathi Engineering College?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Vignana Bharathi Engineering College offers a wide range of programmes at both UG and PG levels. With option for offline learning, students can choose from several streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG stage, courses available include B.E. / B.Tech. For the PG level, there is a wide range of courses like M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Vignana Bharathi Engineering College fee structure ranges between INR 44,700 to 2,48,000.

faqs.answer:
A:    Vignana Bharathi Engineering College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed or appeared at the final year of the Diploma examination in Engineering conducted by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh.
Candidates should have completed 16 years of age, as on 31st December of the year of admission. There is no upper age limit.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have passed Bachelor Degree (BA / B.Com/ B.Sc/ BBA / BBM / BCA / BE / B.Tech / B. Pharmacy / Any 3 or 4 year Degree except Oriental Languages). Examinations of minimum three years duration with at least 50% marks (45% marks in case of reserved categories) in the qualifying examinations.
Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.
The minimum age of the candidates should be 19 years as on the date of notification (Candidates whose date of Birth up to 30th MARCH,  2003). No maximum age limit.After 10th DiplomaCandidates must have passed 10th examination conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or from any other recognised board in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects, and obtained at least 35% marks in the qualifying examination.
Candidate must have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics,

There is no upper age limit.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have passed Bachelor Degree (BA / B.Com/ B.Sc/ BBA / BBM / BCA / BE / B.Tech / B. Pharmacy / Any 3 or 4 year Degree except Oriental Languages). Examinations of minimum three years duration with at least 50% marks (45% marks in case of reserved categories) in the qualifying examinations. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis. The minimum age of the candidates should be 19 years as on the date of notification (Candidates whose date of Birth up to 30th MARCH, 2003). No maximum age limit.After 10th DiplomaCandidates must have passed 10th examination conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or from any other recognised board in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects, and obtained at least 35% marks in the qualifying examination. Candidate must have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% Marks in each subject. Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in March/April-2023, and whose results are yet to be declared are also eligible.

overview_faqs.question: Can Vignana Bharathi Engineering College be considered a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: Vignana Bharathi Engineering College is a reputed institute for B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech, After 1th Diploma. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering, Business & Management Studies. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Vignana Bharathi Engineering College has a review rating of 3.5 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3 on campuslife, 3.2 on placements, 3.9 on faculty and 3.3 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Vignana Bharathi Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college has least on-campus placements.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in our college is really very less compared to other colleges in our area. The highest package is 10 LPA for the 2025 batch, whereas the lowest is 2.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Wipro, Tata Motors, Infosys, etc. The percentage of students who received internships through our course is 30% with companies like Accenture, Microsoft, and TCS. Top roles offered are Python developer, sales, HR, frontend developer, and testing technician. The placement number is not increasing much through the years due to a lack of skills among students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am highly satisfied with faculty members of this college.

content.Placements: Almost 75% of students got placed in this course. The highest salary package offered was 10 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, and Infosys. Around 50% of students got internships at Cognizant, Tech Mahindra, etc. Top roles offered are graduate engineer trainer, associate manager, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are very good. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Laboratories are air-conditioned. Washrooms are clean. There is a decent library in this college. Hostel facilities are not available. Many private hostels are available. Mess is decent with attached washrooms.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied because of placements, facilities, and teaching.

content.Placements: In our batch, almost 50% of students got placed. Top recruiting companies visited our campus. Almost 40% to 50% of students got internships. The lowest salary offered was Rs. 15,000 per month to Rs. 20,000 per month and the average salary offered was Rs. 30,000 per month to Rs. 40,000 per month. The highest salary offered was Rs. 50,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provided average infrastructure. Labs were good. Our classrooms were good. The hostels were not available. Students had to live in a private hostel near the college. The bus service was available. Bus transportation was excellent. Sports facilities were available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in our course is 70%. The highest, the lowest and the average package offered in our course is ranging from INR 12 LPA-3.5 LPA. 70% of students got internship from our course. In our college, there are good placements and good internships.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are good in our college. They provide Wi-Fi, labs, library, clean classrooms, good teaching and friendly nature. Teaching is good in our college. Medical facilities, sports and games are available. The facilities are good in our college infrastructure .

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college for the development of students.

content.Placements: Few placements are provided in our college. Many companies don't visit our college for campus placements. Students have to search for jobs outside the campus. Around 50% to 60% of students get placed. The average salary package offered is 5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel is not available in our college, so students have to stay in private hostels nearby. I stay in a private hostel in Ibrahimpatnam. The infrastructure of our college is average. It has a cricket ground. Sports and games are encouraged in our college. Canteen food is good.

reviews.review_heading: The college has least on-campus placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and other facilities in the college are not bad. There is a college library present in the center of the campus, with Wi-Fi facility. There is no on-campus facility for this college, so most of the students stay in private hostels, which are found to be unsafe. Sports and games are not so encouraged throughout the year, but held once a year. The canteen food is not so bad, it is hygienic and even the prices are reasonable for the students to afford.

reviews.review_heading: I am highly satisfied with faculty members of this college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Laboratories are air-conditioned. Washrooms are clean. There is a decent library in this college. Hostel facilities are not available. Many private hostels are available. Mess is decent with attached washrooms.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of placements, facilities, and teaching.
reviews.review_text: Our college provided average infrastructure. Labs were good. Our classrooms were good. The hostels were not available. Students had to live in a private hostel near the college. The bus service was available. Bus transportation was excellent. Sports facilities were available.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text:
The facilities and infrastructure are good in our college. They provide Wi-Fi, labs, library, clean classrooms, good teaching and friendly nature.
Teaching is good in our college. Medical facilities, sports and games are available. The facilities are good in our college infrastructure 
.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for the development of students.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is not available in our college, so students have to stay in private hostels nearby. I stay in a private hostel in Ibrahimpatnam. The infrastructure of our college is average. It has a cricket ground. Sports and games are encouraged in our college. Canteen food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good for studies, facilities, etc.
reviews.review_text: There are no combined hostels, but some hostels nearby are very good. We have a huge library with all kinds of books. Labs are huge and contain every item and material required for students. It provides large classrooms. We found all the books that we required in the library.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good education and students are satisfied with the placements provided.
reviews.review_text: There is no combined hostel but, some hostels nearby are very good. We have a huge library with all kinds of books, and also our labs are too big and contain every item/material required. There is a large area for classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: It's a average college because of bad facilities and careless management.
reviews.review_text: We got a good infrastructure with proper classrooms and labs. We don't have any hostel facility and our management didn't encourage any games. It was very disappointing that our management didn't encourage any extra curricular activities and we got a worst canteen.

reviews.review_heading: I am totally disappointed with my college because of poor infrastructure.
reviews.review_text:
In our college there is a library which is bit small compared to other colleges and also we can find a lot of books. There we can enjoy the better reading experience their exist a digital library which helps students to read better. 
*Highly equipped labs with best lab assistants. 
*Best classrooms with green board. 
*Better canteen & cleanliness is maintained. 
*There is no hostel for the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: It has good infrastructure and facilities and also helpful and qualified teachers.

review_content.Placements: Our college has been providing placements in good companies from the last 3 years as our seniors told us about that. In our batch, placements are not being provided because of the COVID-19 pandemic. Students got admission to our college based on their JEE exam rank. You will also get a direct admission if you have 65% of marks in your 12th standard.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides facilities like good condition classrooms, library, canteen, medical facilities and also sports and games. The food provided in the canteen is good. The library provides all books for every course. Classrooms and labs are air-conditioned, and Wi-Fi is provided for college work.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Infrastructure and placements of the college are dissatisfying, but the faculty members are good.

review_content.Placements: A very few opportunities are available for being selected in any campus placements. Only a few companies visit our college. I have been in this college for three years, and I have never seen any official placements. But I have heard from our seniors that the college provides a few placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is decent. The cafeteria is well-equipped, but the library is not up to the mark. The campus is pretty decent, and the classrooms are pretty good. The campus is lush green and eco-friendly. Parking facility in the college is great and promising. A hostel was available, but now it is abandoned due to some reasons.

faqs.answer: The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing ExecutiveBusiness Technical ConsultantAll the best.
faqs.question: Q: What is the scope of MBA?

faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.
faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?

faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses
faqs.question: Q: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?

faqs.answer: The syllabus for the B Tech EE course focuses on both aspects because they are equally important for you to do well at the workplace in the future. There are theory classes to make you understand the meaning and workings of the Electrical Engineering concepts, and practical lab work and industrial training to give you a glimpse of the real-world applications.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses
faqs.question: Q: Does the BTech Electrical Engineering syllabus focus more on theory or practical application?

review_summary.college_name: Ludhiana Group of Colleges Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good for Not Attending Classes and Those Who Are Working at Any Company.

content.Placements: No MNC companies come, only small startup companies visit in the 5th semester. There is no chance of placement, so try outside campus for interviews. No students have been placed in my batch. I will try outside campus for interviews, so you can try outside campus as well for a better chance of being selected.
content.Infrastructure: The canteen is good, and Wi-Fi is available. There is a big playground and a large seminar hall. One exception is that you can visit the college at any time. Parking for cars is available, and there is no traffic jam. Natural sunlight enters the college, and you will never be disappointed with the college infrastructure.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: It has good infrastructure and facilities and also helpful and qualified teachers.

content.Placements: Our college has been providing placements in good companies from the last 3 years as our seniors told us about that. In our batch, placements are not being provided because of the COVID-19 pandemic. Students got admission to our college based on their JEE exam rank. You will also get a direct admission if you have 65% of marks in your 12th standard.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides facilities like good condition classrooms, library, canteen, medical facilities and also sports and games. The food provided in the canteen is good. The library provides all books for every course. Classrooms and labs are air-conditioned, and Wi-Fi is provided for college work.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Infrastructure and placements of the college are dissatisfying, but the faculty members are good.

content.Placements: A very few opportunities are available for being selected in any campus placements. Only a few companies visit our college. I have been in this college for three years, and I have never seen any official placements. But I have heard from our seniors that the college provides a few placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is decent. The cafeteria is well-equipped, but the library is not up to the mark. The campus is pretty decent, and the classrooms are pretty good. The campus is lush green and eco-friendly. Parking facility in the college is great and promising. A hostel was available, but now it is abandoned due to some reasons.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: A review about LGC and the commitments made by them during admissions.

content.Placements: LGC is a college that promise placements during admissions. But in reality, they never placed any student from their college. Even they also conduct few mock exams to create fake placement interview. This is to get the publicity that we have placed a lot of students. But in 2016 batch not a single student was placed from LGC.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good, and even labs are well equipped. Branded computer systems are installed in the labs, and the networking staff well maintains the labs and even mechanical workshops also good. Lack of games and sports in LGC because they don't promote students in games, and they also don't have a proper ground.

highlights.summary:
The COMEDK UGET 2026 registration last date for Cauvery Institute of Technology admission to the BE/BTech programme has been extended till Mar 20, 2026. Also, the COMEDK UGET exam 2026 will be held on May 9, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with our college, faculty members, and placements.

review_content.Placements: About 70-80% of students get placed in our course. Top recruiting companies like Web Spiders and Pitcs. Top roles offered are web developer and engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is average so it should be improved. Laboratories are good. In our classrooms, there are old benches. The library is good.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers in our college are good, helpful, well-qualified, and knowledgeable. Semester exams are difficult in our course. The question paper is always tricky.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Cauvery Institute of Technology.

review_content.Placements: 65% of students got placed. The highest package offered is 60 LPA, the lowest package is 30 LPA, and the average package is 20 LPA. 50% of students got internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average. There's no hostel in our college. The building is poor. Food in our college canteen is better and affordable. The quality of facilities in our hostel, and the quality of food available in the mess and canteen are good. Medical facilities, sports and games are good.
review_content.Faculty: The faculty members are supportive. Exams are easy. The pass percentage is 35%. The faculty are helpful.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: This college provides good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Around 20% of students are placed. The highest salary package offered is 6 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 2.5 LPA. Infosys, Wipro, L&T, Amazon, NTT Data, IBM, Accenture, Danushre construction, Birla tech, are the top recruiting companies. Almost all go for internships, and the role of our course is good. In our college, they conducted placements training classes for the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has a good infrastructure and good atmosphere and it has good facilities for transportation. Our college has good laboratory classes, classrooms, and library, and it contains good Wi-Fi for searching for information about students' doubts.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is not good. Laboratories are average. The library is good, and the digital library is also present. Canteen is average. The canteen staff often changes every two months and the taste also changes.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the infrastructure and facilities of our college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. There is no Wi-Fi problem while we work in laboratories. Laboratories are well-maintained by separate staff members. Classrooms and benches are good. The hostel is also good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our college, faculty members, and placements.

reviews.review_heading: The college has absolutely good studies, placements, hostel, sports and canteen facilities.
reviews.review_text: In Vignan Institute of Technology and Management, all the facilities are available, like good classrooms, laboratories, library and Wi-Fi. The hostel facility is available with a good environment, and good quality food is available. A canteen is available, providing healthy food for Rs. 40. All types of indoor and outdoor games are available.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text:
Mess canteen, medical facilities and sports are best. The facilities and infrastructure available for your course/department (e. g. Wi-Fi, Labs, Classrooms, Library) are good
the quality of the facilities in your hostel, the quality of food available in the mess and canteen, medical facilities, sports and games are 5 out of 5.

reviews.review_heading: Once upon a time, it was good, but not now. There are no good faculty members and placements.
reviews.review_text: All labs are equipped with complete equipment. The library is also available with a large collection of books. The quality of the food served in the canteen is decent, and it is cheap also. Labs sessions are conducted weekly 3-4 times for 3-4 hours.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Vignan Institute of Technology and Management.
reviews.review_text: There are three labs like a chemistry lab, physics lab, od lab with 3 workshops. There is a library for all college students. There is a Wi-Fi on the campus. All classrooms are neat and clean equipped with a projector. There are two hostels for boys and girls.  There is a huge canteen, and the quality of the food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall it comes after nist in berhampur so go for second chance.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite moderate level if you look other colleges in Thane same premices one admin building, one MBA and one library apart from few labs, Recently +2 also started due to lack of students, Day by day the college joining is reducing its obvious.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely disappointed with this college bad faculties, bad placements, average infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: We had Wi-Fi facility but most often it won't be available for the day scholars but hostel residents can make use of it. Labs were well furnitured with all required equipments, machines and devices as per the syllabus. The classrooms were neat and well ventilated (don't expect ACs). The library was good but its not like you can go and pick your book from the shelf. You have to go to the librarian and tell the name of the book. He will get the book for you. Even if u want to read during class hou...

reviews.review_heading: Manageable infrastructure and good facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is manageable. The infrastructure is good but not architect. Wi-Fi speed is good. The classrooms, labs are good and well-furnished. The library is good. The medical facility is average. The playground is also available for sports and games. The quality of the food is average in the canteen. The hostel rooms are good.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with placements, great faculty members and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Coming to infrastructure, it have good infrastructure overall like Wi-Fi facility, laboratory room, no medical facility because there is no medical course, sports and games facility (indoor games i.e. 4 carrom boards, 2 chess board, two table tennis court).

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities and faculty members but dissatisfied regarding placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by the campus were good. The labs and classrooms were neat and tidy. The quality of food available in the canteen was quite good. I didn't stay in the hostel. So, I don't have much idea on the hostel room and facilities available there. No, I didn't face any infrastructure related issues during my tenure at the college.

reviews.review_heading: Fully satisfied. The college environment is friendly. Anti-ragging zone. Good platform for sports.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is the superb, and very good condition. Fully air conditioning and all the equipment is available in the labs related to the studies. The hostel infrastructure is superb, and there are different types of indoor and outdoor games available in this college. The transportation facility is quite bad, but it is okay.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Panchkula Engineering College (PEC Panchkula) offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. Whereas, at PG level, Panchkula Engineering College (PEC Panchkula) offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Panchkula Engineering College (PEC Panchkula) fee structure for all the courses is around INR 1,20,000 to 2,30,865.
